case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. GARY GUEITS

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GUEITS, GARY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-31-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-16-2009

NON-SERVICE/RETURN: PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT, OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARB AWARD; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; NOTICE OF NON-APPEARANCE; P&A IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; DECLARATRION OF COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2); ORDER; JUDGEMNT; MEMO OF COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUN-16-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-21-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-31-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-21-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
